footer.label: End
footer.tagline: Available for freelance projects, collaborations, and full-time opportunities.

hero.label: Portfolio
hero.description: Crafting immersive digital experiences at the intersection of design precision and technical craft.

about.label: About
about.quote: Bridging the gap between what looks right and what works right.
about.bio1: I'm a UX/UI designer and web developer based in Paris, combining design precision with technical craft. I build digital experiences that feel alive — from interactive web apps to immersive 3D interfaces.
about.bio2: With a background at Epitech and 5+ years of experience across design systems, front-end development, and user research, I bridge the gap between what looks right and what works right.
about.currentLocation: Currently based in Paris, working at the intersection of design thinking and modern web technology.

skills.summary: {count} technologies and tools I work with daily.

frontend.label: Frontend
frontend.description: Building responsive, performant, and interactive user interfaces.

design.label: Design
design.description: Crafting intuitive experiences and cohesive visual systems.

backend.label: Backend & Tools
backend.description: APIs, databases, infrastructure, and developer tooling.

uxDesign.title: UX / UI Design
uxDesign.description: User-centred interfaces crafted through research, wireframing, and iterative prototyping. From design systems to polished, production-ready mockups.

webDev.title: Web Development
webDev.description: Performant, accessible web applications built with modern frameworks — React, Next.js, TypeScript — and best-practice architecture.

threeDInteractive.title: 3D & Interactive
threeDInteractive.description: Immersive experiences with Three.js and WebGL. From subtle ambient scenes to full interactive 3D visualisations.

consulting.title: Consulting & Audit
consulting.description: Technical audits, UX reviews, and strategic advice to improve your existing product's performance, accessibility, and user experience.

discovery.caption: Discovery Rate
discovery.description: Preferential rate for our first collaboration. Ideal for an initial project, audit, or proof of concept.

standard.caption: Standard Rate
standard.description: Standard daily rate for ongoing projects. Long-term partnerships and complex builds.

portfolio.title: Personal Portfolio — tombp.fr
portfolio.description: Modern portfolio with Three.js wireframe gears, scroll animations, and Void & Gold aesthetic.

libertai.description: Corporate website redesign for an AI company — modern brand presence, responsive, accessible.

chuckforever.description: Tribute site for Chuck Norris with a custom calendar system, countdown timer, quotes, videos, and lore pages.

defidecon.title: Défi de Con
defidecon.description: Daily challenge platform with streak tracking, leaderboards, and admin dashboard. Built with Next.js and Supabase.

codearena.title: Code Arena
codearena.description: Competitive coding platform with challenges across multiple difficulty tiers, score tracking, streaks, and leaderboards.

tomuiplayground.title: Tom UI Playground
tomuiplayground.description: Browser-based UI dev environment with Monaco code editor, live preview, file explorer, and console.

pokerandom.title: Pokérandom — Starter Generator
pokerandom.description: Pokémon starter draft tool with solo vs AI mode, local 2-player draft, team builder, and retro pixel UI inspired by the DS Pokédex.

tomcraft.title: TomCraft
tomcraft.description: Minecraft-inspired voxel sandbox built from scratch. Infinite procedural worlds, 9 biomes, 20+ mobs with AI, crafting, and survival gameplay.

wolfenstom.title: Wolfenstom 3D
wolfenstom.description: Steampunk FPS inspired by Wolfenstein 3D. Ray-casting engine in the browser with procedural maps and steampunk weapons.

moodTracker.description: Track your daily mood, energy, and focus levels to identify patterns and gain insights that can help manage ADHD symptoms.
moodTracker.noEntriesYet: No entries yet. Add some daily records to see insights.
moodTracker.needMoreEntries: Add at least 3 entries to see patterns and insights.
moodTracker.noActivityImpact: No entries yet. Add some daily records with activities to see their impact.
moodTracker.notesPlaceholder: Any additional thoughts about your day...

insights.needMore: Add more entries to see patterns and insights
insights.positiveActivities: Activities that seem to improve your well-being: {activities}
insights.lowEnergy: You appear to have more low-energy days. Consider energy management strategies.
insights.lowFocus: Your focus scores tend to be on the lower side. Explore strategies to support your attention.
insights.consistentTracking: Consistent tracking will reveal more patterns and insights over time

tips.easiestFirst: Start with the easiest step to build momentum.
tips.breakDownFurther: If a step feels too big, break it down further.
tips.celebrate: Celebrate every checked box — progress is progress.
tips.reorder: Reorder steps so the next action is always on top.
